app.title: Learning Platform
app.description: A learning platform built with Next.js and shadcn/ui

home.title: AI-assisted learning platform
home.subtitle: Start onboarding to get age-aware assessment and a personalized first learning path.

age.title: Choose your age level
age.subtitle: We adapt question style and pace based on your age group.

program.title: Select your program
program.subtitle: Choose a learning track. You can refine it with your mentor later.

error.age_missing: Age level is missing. Please complete the previous step.

assessment.title: Assessment
assessment.subtitle: Answer a short set of questions so we can personalize your first units.

q1.prompt: How comfortable are you with coding basics?

q2.prompt: How often do you build projects?

q3.prompt: Describe one learning goal this month.

feedback.title: Your personalized plan is ready
feedback.no_result: Complete the assessment first to receive your personalized feedback.

dashboard.title: Learner dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Your first units are unlocked based on your onboarding assessment.

signin.title: Sign in to continue
signin.subtitle: Use learner sign-in to start your personalized onboarding.
signin.name: Name
